overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of a character in military uniform walking through an industrial corridor at night. The character pauses to look out large windows at the night sky before continuing toward two guards standing by a security door.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily down the corridor toward the security door at the far end

notable_agents.action: two guards in military uniforms standing stationary by the metal door

entered.detail: large rectangular windows showing dark night sky and exterior structures
red tiled wall paneling running along both sides of the corridor
overhead fluorescent light fixtures illuminating the corridor
large industrial metal door with horizontal push bar at corridor end
exposed industrial pipes running along the upper right wall

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a third-person view following a military uniformed character walking down a long, industrial corridor. The hallway features red wainscoting, large windows on the left showing night sky, and fluorescent overhead lighting. Two guards stand stationary at the far end by a metal security door.

events.description: character turns left to face the corridor windows and observe the exterior night scene
character's reflection becomes visible in the window glass as they look outside

agents.ego_description: standing by the windows looking out at the night sky and distant exterior structures

entered.detail: dark blue night sky visible through the large corridor windows
reflection of the character and interior fluorescent lights on the glass surface
blurred industrial buildings and structures visible in the distance outside

segments.scene_description: The character stops walking and turns to face the large windows, observing the night sky and exterior industrial landscape. The lighting shifts to a mix of artificial interior and natural night ambient light. The character's reflection appears in the glass as they look out at the dark blue sky and distant structures.

events.description: character turns away from windows and resumes walking down the corridor
approaching the metal security door where two guards stand watch

agents.ego_description: walking toward the security door and the two guards flanking it

notable_agents.action: guard standing at attention to the left of the security door
guard standing at attention to the right of the security door

entered.detail: red fire safety equipment box mounted on the left wall

segments.scene_description: The character turns away from the windows and resumes walking toward the end of the corridor. As they approach, the metal security door and two flanking guards become prominent in the frame. The camera moves closer to the guards standing at attention by the door, with industrial wall pipes visible on the right.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a sterile industrial corridor that shifts from a steady forward march to a moment of quiet observation before concluding at a security checkpoint. It begins by trailing a military uniformed character walking past red wainscoting and fluorescent lights toward two distant guards. As the character stops, the camera pivots toward large windows, shifting the lighting to a mix of artificial glow and dark blue ambient night as the character's reflection appears against the exterior industrial landscape. The scene then turns back toward the hallway as the character resumes their pace, moving deeper into the corridor where industrial wall pipes become visible. Finally, the camera closes the distance, bringing the metal security door and the two guards standing at attention into sharp focus.
